victoria-peak.title: Victoria Peak
victoria-peak.tagline: The Iconic Rooftop of Hong Kong Island
victoria-peak.gettingThere: Take the Peak Tram from Lower Peak Tram Terminus (Garden Road). Bus 15 from Central Exchange Square or taxi.

essentials.gettingAround: Peak Tram or Bus 15 from Central.

tsim-sha-tsui.title: Tsim Sha Tsui
tsim-sha-tsui.tagline: The Heart of Kowloon Golden Mile
tsim-sha-tsui.gettingThere: MTR to Tsim Sha Tsui station (Tsuen Wan Line). Star Ferry from Central Pier 7.

essentials.gettingAround: MTR is fastest. Star Ferry for atmosphere.

mong-kok.title: Mong Kok
mong-kok.tagline: The Worlds Most Densely Packed Urban Grid
mong-kok.gettingThere: MTR Mong Kok station (Kwun Tong Line or Tsuen Wan Line).

essentials.gettingAround: Walk - Mong Kok is dense and walkable.

lantau-island.title: Lantau Island
lantau-island.tagline: Big Buddha Tai O and Tranquil Beaches
lantau-island.gettingThere: MTR to Tung Chung then Ngong Ping 360 cable car. Ferry from Central Pier 6 to Mui Wo (35 min).
highlights: Tian Tan Big Buddha 34-metre bronze statue
Tai O fishing village stilt houses

essentials.gettingAround: Cable car or bus 23 to Big Buddha. Bus 11 to Tai O from Tung Chung.

central.title: Central District
central.tagline: Asias Financial Hub with Colonial Character
central.gettingThere: MTR Central station. Star Ferry from TST. Airport Express to Hong Kong Station.
highlights: HSBC and Bank of China towers

essentials.gettingAround: Walk most of Central. Mid-Levels Escalator for uphill access.

wan-chai.title: Wan Chai
wan-chai.tagline: Old Hong Kong Meets Modern Arts Hub
wan-chai.gettingThere: MTR Wan Chai station (Island Line). Tram from Central. Ferry from TST East Pier.
highlights: Hong Kong Convention and Exhibition Centre

essentials.gettingAround: Walk from Central via tram or MTR.

aberdeen.title: Aberdeen
aberdeen.tagline: Typhoon Shelter Floating Villages and Fresh Seafood
aberdeen.gettingThere: Bus 70 or 72 from Exchange Square Central.

essentials.gettingAround: Bus from Central or Causeway Bay. No MTR direct.

sai-kung.title: Sai Kung
sai-kung.tagline: Hong Kongs Outdoor Playground and Seafood Capital
sai-kung.gettingThere: MTR to Diamond Hill (Kwun Tong Line), then minibus 1A or bus 92 to Sai Kung Town.
highlights: Hoi Ha Wan Marine Park snorkeling

essentials.gettingAround: Kaito ferry to outlying beaches. Bike rental along waterfront.

stanley.title: Stanley
stanley.tagline: Colonial Charm Market Stalls and Beachside Bars
stanley.gettingThere: Bus 6, 6A, or 260 from Exchange Square Central. Bus 73 from Aberdeen.

causeway-bay.title: Causeway Bay
causeway-bay.tagline: Shopping Capital and Japanese Street Food Mecca
causeway-bay.gettingThere: MTR Causeway Bay station (Island Line). Tram from Central or Wan Chai.

lamma-island.title: Lamma Island
lamma-island.tagline: Seafood Village Life No Cars and Laid-Back Beaches
lamma-island.gettingThere: Ferry from Central Pier 4 to Yung Shue Wan (25 min) or Sok Kwu Wan (35 min). HKD 20-30 each way.
highlights: Yung Shue Wan village bohemian cafes and seafood
Sok Kwu Wan outdoor seafood restaurants
Lamma Island Family Trail 1 hour walk

essentials.gettingAround: Walk between villages. No cars on island.

tai-o.title: Tai O
tai-o.tagline: Ancient Stilt Village and Pink Dolphin Gateway
tai-o.gettingThere: From Tung Chung: Bus 11 (40 minutes). From Mui Wo: Bus 1 (60 minutes).
highlights: Stilt house community over tidal channels
Tai O Heritage Hotel former police station
Shrimp paste and dried seafood market
